pages.text:
Government of Nepal

Minister for Foreign Affairs

Ministry of Foreign Affairs

Shital Niwas

Kathmandu, Nepal

INSTRUMENT OF ACCESSION

WHEREAS the Convention relating to International Exhibitions was done at Paris on 22 November 1928 - WHEREAS the Convention was amended and supplemented by the Protocols of 10 May 1948, 16 November 1966, 30 November 1972.

the Amendments of 24 June 1982 and 31 May 1988:

AND WHEREAS Article 3 of the 1972 Protocol provides to the effect that the Protocol shall. remain open for

accession. by

Governments Parties to the 1928 Convention after 29 November 1973»

NOW THEREFORE, the Government of Nepal hereby acedes to the 1928 Convention and the

1972 Protocol, including the

Amendments of 24 June 1982 and 31 May 1988, and undertakes faithfully to fulfil and carry out all the provisions therein contained.

IN WITNESS WHEREOF, I, Sahana Pradhan,. Minister for

Foreign Affairs of Nepal, have signed the present Instrument of

Accession and caused the Seal of my Office to bè hereunto affixed.

the year to Thousand and al, on this Tung-fich day of ta the

., corresponding to th

Twelfth day of November, the year Two Thousand and Seven.

- Satana

Prathou

Sahana Pradhan

Minister for Foreign Affairs
